text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Fan Fest three-legged race kicks off. With all
the odd combinations, it proves to be an uphill
struggle for everyone.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Bono, your strides are too wide! I have to take
three steps for every one you make!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Oh, this is tough! Should we slow down?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Rob Roy, don't move just yet! Hm, now how do I
summon a magic carpet?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Um, I-I think... just running like normal may be the
faster option!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Onward, to the ends of the earth!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Well, it looks like every pair is out of sync with
each other. Maybe if we just increase our pace a
little...

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
The solution is on the horizon! There must be a
way for our bodies to unite and move as one!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: That's it! This is when the hero strikes back!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
And when all was lost, the strangest thing
occurred! The Pegasus Power in me boosts my
stride!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Umm... I don't see anything changing.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hurry! Hurry! You read more books than me, so
you should know a spell! Hurry up and cast it!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Uhh! I really think we're better off just running!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami! Put aside your pride. Show some
humility and cooperate with me.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Work with me to reach the ends of the earth!

text_block_list.name: Referee
text_block_list.text: Fweeeet! You've all exceeded the time limit and are hereby disqualified!
